design: MidFreq bet1 + ExtremeCol(gap>=25) bet2, orthogonal exclusion
failure_reason: STABLE and perm_p<0.05, but SIGNIFICANTLY worse than ADOPTED MidFreq+ACB (McNemar p=0.0022, net=-43). Edge +2.19% vs +5.06%. ExtremeCol replaces ACB but loses ACB's broader coverage of moderate cold numbers.
key_insight: ACB continuous scoring captures extreme cold numbers AS WELL AS moderate cold — ExtremeCol hard threshold filters OUT the moderate cold that ACB would hit. Hypothetical 4/5 on 115000061 was case-specific, not generalizable.
retest_conditions: None — definitively inferior per McNemar significance test
